questions.q: Which provincial premier stated that U.S. liquor won't return to store shelves until Donald Trump drops tariffs and releases the Epstein files?
options: Wab Kinew
Danielle Smith
Doug Ford
David Eby

questions.q: A Winnipeg woman was tragically killed just one day after a court appearance where she sought what type of protection against her alleged killer?
options: A peace bond
An eviction notice
A neighborhood watch request
A federal witness protection order

questions.q: In an effort to lower barriers for consumers, the CRTC ordered Canadian telecoms to allow customers to do what without needing a service representative?
options: Cancel or change their plans online
Receive free unlimited data on weekends
Keep their phone hardware for free after one year
Skip late payment fees for the first month
questions.correctText: Cancel or change their plans online

questions.q: The Trump administration recently offered immediate tariff relief to Canadian aluminum and steel companies under what strict condition?
options: They commit to moving production to the U.S.
They only use raw materials mined in the U.S.
They cut ties with Chinese suppliers
They pay a 10% premium tax upfront
questions.correctText: They commit to moving production to the U.S.

questions.q: According to Energy and Natural Resources Minister Tim Hodgson, what sector will Canada use as its 'strongest card' for leverage in CUSMA trade renegotiations?
options: The energy and natural resources sector
The aerospace manufacturing sector
The agricultural and farming sector
The tech and artificial intelligence sector
questions.correctText: The energy and natural resources sector
